Our Leadership

Dedicated Hearts

Serving our congregation and community. Get to know the pastors and directors who guide Greater Faith Grace Bible Church.

Strategic Team

Senior Pastor

Dr. Samuel Rivers

"My heart is to see every soul find peace in His grace and live a life of purpose."
Pastoral Team

Assistant Pastor

Sarah Jenkins

"Serving the broken and lifting the heavy-hearted through compassionate ministry."
Pastoral Team

Assistant Pastor

Marcus Thorne

"Building a foundation of faith for the next generation to stand firm upon."
Creative

Worship Director

Elizabeth Chen

"Leading our congregation into deep, authentic worship through the power of song."
Ministries

Youth Ministry Lead

David Miller

"Empowering youth to live out their calling boldly in an ever-changing world."
Ministries

Children's Ministry Lead

Rachel Adams

"Nurturing the seeds of faith in our little ones with love and patience."
question_answer

Ask The Team

We are here to support you in your spiritual journey. Reach out to any of our staff members or visit our main office during weekly hours.
